chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S-277 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 27-11-2023 Mr. Riaz Ali Shaikh, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** Learned counsel for the applicant, under instructions, does not press this Crl. Misc. Application, as the applicant intends to file a Crl. Direct Complaint against the respondents, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed in the above terms. JUDGE Ahmad
